memberdef.name: DALI_TOKEN_PASTE_EXPAND
memberdef.initializer: x##y

briefdescription.para: Definition for macros that are used internally by the property macros. Use the the property macros in the section below this one (without the _INTERNAL postfix) when defining properties. These internal macros exist as to perform the compile-time check on the enumeration order, the COUNTER macro is used twice. Using it twice within the same macro would result in two different values.

memberdef.name: DALI_TOKEN_PASTE
memberdef.initializer: DALI_TOKEN_PASTE_EXPAND(x, y)

memberdef.name: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: Dali::PropertyRegistration DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(property, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, objectNamespace::objectType::Property::enumIndex, Dali::Property::valueType, &objectType::SetProperty, &objectType::GetProperty); \ static_assert((static_cast<int>(objectNamespace::objectType::Property::enumIndex) - static_cast<int>(objectNamespace::objectType::PROPERTY_START_INDEX)) == count);

memberdef.name: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_FULL_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: Dali::PropertyRegistration DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(property, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, handleNamespace::handleType::Property::enumIndex, Dali::Property::valueType, &objectNamespace::objectType::SetProperty, &objectType::GetProperty); \ static_assert((static_cast<int>(handleNamespace::handleType::Property::enumIndex) - static_cast<int>(handleNamespace::handleType::PROPERTY_START_INDEX)) == count);

memberdef.name: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_READ_ONLY_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: Dali::PropertyRegistration DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(property, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, objectNamespace::objectType::Property::enumIndex, Dali::Property::valueType, NULL, &objectType::GetProperty); \ static_assert((static_cast<int>(objectNamespace::objectType::Property::enumIndex) - static_cast<int>(objectNamespace::objectType::PROPERTY_START_INDEX)) == count);

memberdef.name: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_READ_ONLY_FULL_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: Dali::PropertyRegistration DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(property, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, handleNamespace::handleType::Property::enumIndex, Dali::Property::valueType, NULL, &objectNamespace::objectType::GetProperty); \ static_assert((static_cast<int>(handleNamespace::handleType::Property::enumIndex) - static_cast<int>(handleNamespace::handleType::PROPERTY_START_INDEX)) == count);

memberdef.name: DALI_ANIMATABLE_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: Dali::AnimatablePropertyRegistration DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(property, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, objectNamespace::objectType::Property::enumIndex, Dali::Property::valueType);

memberdef.name: DALI_ANIMATABLE_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_WITH_DEFAULT_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: Dali::AnimatablePropertyRegistration DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(property, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, objectNamespace::objectType::Property::enumIndex, value);

memberdef.name: DALI_ANIMATABLE_PROPERTY_COMPONENT_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: Dali::AnimatablePropertyComponentRegistration DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(property, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, objectNamespace::objectType::Property::enumIndex, objectNamespace::objectType::Property::baseEnumIndex, componentIndex);

memberdef.name: DALI_CHILD_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: Dali::ChildPropertyRegistration DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(property, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, objectNamespace::objectType::ChildProperty::enumIndex, Property::valueType);

memberdef.name: DALI_SIGNAL_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: const char* const textVariable = text; \ Dali::SignalConnectorType DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(signalConnector, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, &objectNamespace::Internal::objectType::DoConnectSignal);

memberdef.name: DALI_SIGNAL_REGISTRATION_FULL_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: const char* const textVariable = text; \ Dali::SignalConnectorType DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(signalConnector, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, &objectNamespace::objectType::DoConnectSignal);

memberdef.name: DALI_ACTION_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: const char* const textVariable = text; \ Dali::TypeAction DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(signalConnector, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, &objectNamespace::Internal::objectType::DoAction);

memberdef.name: DALI_ACTION_REGISTRATION_FULL_INTERNAL
memberdef.initializer: const char* const textVariable = text; \ Dali::TypeAction DALI_TOKEN_PASTE(signalConnector, count)(typeRegistrationObject, text, &objectNamespace::objectType::DoAction);

memberdef.name: DALI_TYPE_REGISTRATION_BEGIN
memberdef.initializer: Dali::TypeRegistration typeRegistration(typeid(thisType), typeid(baseType), createFunction);

briefdescription.para: These macros are used to define properties for implementations of CustomActor. @SINCE_1_1.36.

detaileddescription.para:
These macros should be used when defining properties, signals and actions. They provide the following benefits:
A standard and consistent way to define properties.
Concise definition promotes readability, especially with large numbers of properties.
Provides a built-in compile-time check. This checks the order of the properties within the enumeration match the order of the property macros. Note: This check is not performed for animatable properties.
Enforces how properties are enumerated in the object handles header file.
Note: The compile-type check will produce the following message on failure: error: invalid application of 'sizeof' to incomplete type 'Dali::CompileTimeAssertBool<false>'

Within the your object's implementation cpp: #include<dali/devel-api/object/type-registry-helper.h> ... DALI_TYPE_REGISTRATION_BEGIN(MyApp::MyCustomActor,Dali::CustomActor,Create) DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION(MyApp,MyCustomActor,"myProperty",INTEGER,MY_PROPERTY) DALI_TYPE_REGISTRATION_END()
Using these macros have certain prerequisites on how the property enumeration is defined. Please see the Programming Guide (within the generated Doxygen) for full details.
Macros with the suffix FULL can be used to create controls with different handle and object names, e.g.

memberdef.name: DALI_TYPE_REGISTRATION_BEGIN_CREATE
memberdef.initializer: Dali::TypeRegistration typeRegistration(typeid(thisType), typeid(baseType), createFunction, createAtStartup);

memberdef.name: DALI_TYPE_REGISTRATION_BEGIN_FULL
memberdef.initializer: Dali::TypeRegistration typeRegistration(typeid(handleType), typeid(objectType), typeid(baseHandleType), createFunction);

memberdef.name: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION
memberdef.initializer: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, objectNamespace, objectType, text, valueType, enumIndex)

memberdef.name: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_FULL
memberdef.initializer: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_FULL_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, handleNamespace, handleType, objectNamespace, objectType, text, valueType, enumIndex)

memberdef.name: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_READ_ONLY
memberdef.initializer: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_READ_ONLY_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, objectNamespace, objectType, text, valueType, enumIndex)

memberdef.name: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_READ_ONLY_FULL
memberdef.initializer: DALI_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_READ_ONLY_FULL_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, handleNamespace, handleType, objectNamespace, objectType, text, valueType, enumIndex)

memberdef.name: DALI_ANIMATABLE_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION
memberdef.initializer: DALI_ANIMATABLE_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, objectNamespace, objectType, text, valueType, enumIndex)

memberdef.name: DALI_ANIMATABLE_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_WITH_DEFAULT
memberdef.initializer: DALI_ANIMATABLE_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_WITH_DEFAULT_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, objectNamespace, objectType, text, value, enumIndex)

memberdef.name: DALI_ANIMATABLE_PROPERTY_COMPONENT_REGISTRATION
memberdef.initializer: DALI_ANIMATABLE_PROPERTY_COMPONENT_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, objectNamespace, objectType, text, enumIndex, baseEnumIndex, componentIndex)

memberdef.name: DALI_CHILD_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION
memberdef.initializer: DALI_CHILD_PROPERTY_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, objectNamespace, objectType, text, valueType, enumIndex)

memberdef.name: DALI_SIGNAL_REGISTRATION
memberdef.initializer: DALI_SIGNAL_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, objectNamespace, objectType, text, textVariable)

memberdef.name: DALI_SIGNAL_REGISTRATION_FULL
memberdef.initializer: DALI_SIGNAL_REGISTRATION_FULL_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, handleNamespace, handleType, objectNamespace, objectType, text, textVariable)

memberdef.name: DALI_ACTION_REGISTRATION
memberdef.initializer: DALI_ACTION_REGISTRATION_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, objectNamespace, objectType, text, textVariable)

memberdef.name: DALI_ACTION_REGISTRATION_FULL
memberdef.initializer: DALI_ACTION_REGISTRATION_FULL_INTERNAL(__COUNTER__, typeRegistration, handleNamespace, handleType, objectNamespace, objectType, text, textVariable)
